mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO EVS_SCHEDULE ( SEQ, RESUME_SEQ, SCHEDULE_TYPE, NO, NAME, DEPTNO, DEPTNAME, POST_GRADE_NO, POST_GRADE_NAME, EVS_OBJECT, EVS_STEP, ACTIVITY, DEPT_TYPE, ORDER_NO, PERSON_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scheduleType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{no, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postGradeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postGradeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evsObject, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evsStep, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, -- Mặc định là active khi tạo mới #{deptType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 200,
#{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TO_DATE(#{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
NULL,
TO_DATE(#{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
NULL,
#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update:
UPDATE EVS_SCHEDULE SET NO = CASE WHEN SCHEDULE_TYPE = 'CPNY' THEN #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ELSE GET_CODE_NO(#{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'0',#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'DEPT') END, NAME = DECODE(SCHEDULE_TYPE,'CPNY',#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), DEPTNO = #{deptNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPTNAME = #{deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POST_GRADE_NO = #{postGradeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POST_GRADE_NAME = #{postGradeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EVS_OBJECT = #{evsObject, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EVS_STEP = GET_CODE_NO(#{evsStepName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'14015065',#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'CODE'), DEPT_TYPE = #{deptType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_DATE =
TO_DATE(#{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL , END_DATE =
TO_DATE(#{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL , UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
